mapper.select:
SELECT d.id, d.category_id, c.name AS category_name, d.name, d.price, d.image_url, d.description, d.status FROM dish d INNER JOIN category c ON c.id = d.category_id WHERE d.status = 1 AND c.status = 1
AND d.category_id = #{categoryId}
AND d.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY d.id ASC

SELECT d.id, d.category_id, c.name AS category_name, d.name, d.price, d.image_url, d.description, d.status FROM dish d INNER JOIN category c ON c.id = d.category_id WHERE d.id = #{id} AND d.status = 1 AND c.status = 1 LIMIT 1
